🆕 Newly posted (June 12, 2026)

Municipal road 1st district route 8 closure

Municipal road 1st district route 8 is closed in the section shown on the map below due to a fallen tree.

We apologize for the inconvenience and appreciate your understanding.

We will notify you again once repairs are complete.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/emergency/13691.html
summary: ℹ️ Road closure: Hanno municipal road 1st district route 8
